I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

**It is so crucial that we take advantage of every chance we have to flip a swing district - which North Carolina’s First District now is****.**

_Will you help me beat Democrat G.K. Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote?_

I apologize for being short, but I don't have a lot of time. **I have a big fundraising deadline at the end of this month, I must raise $50,000 to keep pace with my radical Dem opponent. I have only $9,255 to go against my goal!**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iMPEtrtlopNxmng&b=2WiBAhrk_Z3Ez4LRwDm3vw), with your maximum contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000, or even $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

Hi Peter

**_I'm Bill Olson, the combat vet and patriot running to take back Florida's 9th District from Democrat Darren Soto. _**

**_I don't have a lot of time, [and I](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iRaTObv0v_6OuRU&b=MfyM7_A4PJbf_piuZMkxIw) [really need your help today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iRaTObv0v_6OuRU&b=MfyM7_A4PJbf_piuZMkxIw)!_**

You saw what happened this week because if Nancy Pelosi. 3.3 million Americans went on unemployment. People suffered because Pelosi thought it was more important to toss some pork at her favorite causes, like the Green New Deal and the Kennedy Center for Performing Arts.

This is all part of the Democrats' War on America. We must stop them now! **[Can you help me stop them?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iRaTObv0v_6OuRU&b=MfyM7_A4PJbf_piuZMkxIw)**

**I need your help to oust these guys from Congress. **Let's send "nutjob" Nancy Pelosi home in defeat TODAY!

_Let's get this done!_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iRaTObv0v_6OuRU&b=MfyM7_A4PJbf_piuZMkxIw)

Bill Olson

Supports President Trump

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iRaTObv0v_6OuRU&b=MfyM7_A4PJbf_piuZMkxIw)
---
P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. [Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iRaTObv0v_6OuRU&b=MfyM7_A4PJbf_piuZMkxIw) No amount is too small. disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
In Q3 of 2019, our team raised $160,000.
In Q4, we nearly doubled our first quarter raising $260,000 to close out 2019 strong.
In the first quarter of this year, we’re on pace for our biggest quarter to date. We know that right now, it’s more important than ever to send good leaders to Washington.
And we’re doing it all without compromising our values — we’re rejecting corporate PAC dollars and special interest money, unlike Andy Barr who is part of Mitch McConnell’s dark money machine.
Can you chip in $5 or $10 before our first reporting deadline on Tuesday, March 31? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=20200329_em_fr_eoq3_top&amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500]
— Team Hicks
---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Team Hicks
Date: March 28, 2020
Re: Grit, determination, and grassroots support
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=20200329_em_fr_eoq3_hdr&amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=20200329_em_fr_eoq3_hdr&amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500]
Raising online donations from real, everyday people — not big corporations or special interests — has been front and center in Josh’s campaign since day one.
Right now, those donations are more important than ever, friends .
We know things are difficult and confusing — there’s been a massive disruption to our daily lives. If you’re unable to chip in, we understand.

Dear Friend, As always, I hope you and yours are safe and healthy. This week, President Trump _finally_ invoked the Defense Production Act to compel corporations to step up production of ventilators, while paradoxically calling for relaxation of social distancing to "pack the churches" on Easter Sunday. Social distancing can't go on forever, but it can't end on an arbitrary date. The return to normal has to be governed by facts, and the facts on the ground have not yet changed. The only way to revive the economy is to contain the virus, and the only way to contain the virus is to pause the economy. There _are_ early indications that we're starting to flatten the curve. While, tragically, the numbers continue to rise, over the last three days the daily growth rate of infections has consistently dropped. It might mean that we're finally getting ahead of this thing that we've been two steps behind all along. Social distancing is the only thing that's moving the needle and once our public health experts indicate it's safe, many of us will relish going to church again on Sunday mornings. We can beat this, but we must not lose our resolve. Elections matter now more than ever in these uncertain times. body:
#
Time is flying by and we now only have 2 days left until our huge FEC fundraising deadline.
[**I can’t emphasize enough how much it would help us reach our goal if you donated even just $5 today to our grassroots campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16648847/177066311/1004657460?refcode=em20200329&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGIzYzIxNy1lMjcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tDwBTlNy-PQsobaVDBvD4SZwg99lZjj3Y6RzTP4T4vk=)
Your donation will help us pay for our:
* **Trainings** so we can grow our volunteer team
* **Virtual townhalls and webinars** with Charles
* **Subscriptions** to online tools so we can keep organizing & reaching out to voters remotely
* **Digital ads** so we can spread Charles’ bold, progressive message
* **Tech team** so they can support our digital work

name: Marcy, Digital Director
subject: what you can do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | Derek --

Like many campaigns, Team Warner is figuring out how to shift our campaign to digital for the safety of our staffers, volunteers, and Mark's constituents. Over the last few weeks, I've heard from many of our incredible volunteers that they're still looking for ways to help the campaign. First of all, thank you for your support!

We've been working hard to make a list of how folks can help **while following guidelines for social distancing.** Here's what we came up with:
* **Make sure you 're registered to vote.** You can **[register online](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d557/53d9897e/5327f670/1c899ad0/1683173212/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.vote.org/")** in Virginia, which means that you can make sure you're set up for November right from your couch.
* **Once you 've checked your registration status, check in on three friends.** Making sure that others in your network are registered and ready for Election Day is something you can do virtually, with a text message, phone call, or email.
* **Learn about more opportunities to get involved with Team Warner** by visiting our new **[digital organizing page.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d557/53d9897e/5327f670/1c899adf/1683173212/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com/digital-organizing/")**
* **Consider[donating to our digital program](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d557/53d9897e/5327f670/1c899ade/1683173212/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUyOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-digital?refcode=20200329_f_1_nd__529__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5"), if you have the means.** If you are able to give, your contribution will fund our online voter registration training, our text and phone banking tools, and our email program. Our team is working hard on projects including virtual town halls with Mark, and we could really use your support, if you're able.

During this turbulent time, I'm glad Mark is fighting for us in the Senate, making sure the federal government's coronavirus response is helping workers and those on the front lines of this pandemic. Our team is working hard (remotely) to make sure we keep Mark in the Senate, and we're so appreciative of the folks who are helping us meet that goal -- either through their **[contributions](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d557/53d9897e/5327f670/1c899add/1683173212/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUyOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-digital?refcode=20200329_f_1_nd__529__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")** or by giving their time.

We know this is an uncertain time for a lot of folks, and we really appreciate everyone who has reached out to wish Mark well and find out how to get involved with our campaign. We run on more than donors, and we are so grateful to have our strong community as a constant during this uncertain time.

-- Marcy, Digital Director

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d557/53d9897e/5327f670/1c899adc/1683173212/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUyOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-digital?refcode=20200329_f_1_nd__529__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d557/53d9897e/5327f670/1c899adb/1683173212/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

subject: Our future is at stake

body:
See why the Democrats will spend MILLIONS to protect Jeanne Shaheen!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d377acf3524a6481/9175dc8ee9a72511c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter,

We’re on the front line in the political fight of our lifetime.

If the Democrats seize complete control of our federal government on November 3rd, NOTHING will stop them from forcing their socialist agenda on the American people!

We must defeat vulnerable Senate Democrats to stop this threat. Our nation’s future is at stake... and it could all hinge on what we do here in New Hampshire.

**Corky needs EVERY conservative on board in the fight to DEFEAT JEANNE SHAHEEN!**

We just ran the numbers. We still have $15,079 to go to reach our all-important end-of-quarter goal – and our deadline is TOMORROW at 11:59 p.m.

If you haven’t donated this critical fundraising drive yet, **[please chip in $5, $10, $25, or $50, or more if you can](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d377acf3524a6481/08bbd098f16ab9d6c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**. They know, just like we do, that control of the U.S. Senate could all come down to the outcome in this race.

We can’t let up for a minute... and right now, online support is more important than ever.

**[If you want to help defeat Jeanne Shaheen, make your most generous possible contribution today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d377acf3524a6481/b35f32332eaeab9ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

Every $1 we raise will help us reach 7 more voters online!

\- Team Messner [ Rush critical support HERE! >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d377acf3524a6481/1a42e321e0896158c3d6b838967d376c/33153) PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Health care workers on the frontlines need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363900be/55b66746/23f1f2b0/80e1635/981888280/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Hey, We hope you are holding up well. Keeping safe. Practicing social distancing. And taking all the necessary precautions. We're sure you've been keeping up on the news, and have seen there is a grave shortage of masks and other essential medical equipment for our frontline health care workers. So we are hoping this community will help out. We did some research and came across an organization called "Direct Relief." Direct Relief is a humanitarian aid organization, active in all 50 states and more than 80 countries, with a mission to improve the health and lives of people affected by poverty or emergencies - without regard to politics, religion, or ability to pay. Right now their biggest focus is providing personal protective equipment -- "PPE" -- to frontline workers across the country. Things like masks, gowns and other gear to keep them safe while they work around the clock to save lives. So, if you are financially able at this difficult time, consider pitching in a few dollars to Direct Relief so they can help manufacture and provide these critical supplies for frontline workers: **Donate to Direct Relief to help provide masks to workers on the frontlines:** [Donate](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363900be/55b66746/23f1f2b0/80e1636/981888280/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kennedy-directrelief?refcode=2020-03-29-directrelief&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") After weeks of pressure from Joe and countless Members of Congress across the country, the president finally invoked the Defense Production Act... but hasn't yet called for the production of masks. So in the face of the president's lack of leadership, it's up to us to help ensure our country stays safe. We need more than tweets from our elected leaders. We need action. We need to take care of our own. So far we have raised nearly $30,000 directly for frontline organizations across the country and our campaign has donated nearly $7,000 to charities in Massachusetts. At this moment, we refuse to do nothing. We will continue leveraging every resource we have to help those on the frontlines. We're in this together, and we'll get through this -- together. Keep safe. Team Kennedy **Support Direct Relief** [Donate](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363900be/55b66746/23f1f2b0/80e1636/981888280/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kennedy-directrelief?refcode=2020-03-29-directrelief&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---

At this moment, we refuse to do nothing. We will continue leveraging every resource we have to help those on the frontlines. We're in this together, and we'll get through this -- together. Keep safe. Team Kennedy Support Direct Relief "" | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts. ---|--- | This email was sent by "". PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137. "" "" "" Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? "". This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com; "". If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, "" Questions or concerns? "". |

subject: a measure of our campaign's strength
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We need to show everyone that MJ has what it takes to defeat Sen. Cornyn in November.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903cc/7f51f7bc/4cdc9b76/4ef1de23/1168084821/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903cc/7f51f7bc/4cdc9b76/4ef1de22/1168084821/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200329.1nd__1133__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
URGENT, Peter: This Tuesday marks our **first end-of-quarter deadline of the runoff period _and_ of the election year** \-- so we need to come out of the gates running strong!

Everyone from the media to our opponents will use the fundraising report we release to measure our campaign's strength, and we need to show them that **_MJ has what it takes to win_.

Thanks to this grassroots team we've met every goal we've set so far, but we can't quit now! [Pitch in before Tuesday's deadline to help us reach our $75,000 end-of-quarter goal and prove we have what it takes to defeat Sen. Cornyn. >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903cc/7f51f7bc/4cdc9b76/4ef1de22/1168084821/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200329.1nd__1133__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

If we're going to send someone with _real_ Texas values to the Senate, we need to make sure we nominate the candidate with the best chance of victory in November.

**As a combat veteran and working mom who 's experienced the struggles Texas families face every single day, MJ is that candidate.** But she's counting on your grassroots support to help her compete with Sen. Cornyn's big money machine!

**Will you rush a donation before Tuesday 's midnight deadline to help us reach our $75,000 goal, win the runoff, and beat Sen. Cornyn this November?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903cc/7f51f7bc/4cdc9b76/4ef1de21/1168084821/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200329.1nd__1133__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903cc/7f51f7bc/4cdc9b76/4ef1de20/1168084821/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200329.1nd__1133__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903cc/7f51f7bc/4cdc9b76/4ef1de27/1168084821/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200329.1nd__1133__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903cc/7f51f7bc/4cdc9b76/4ef1de26/1168084821/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200329.1d__1133__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903cc/7f51f7bc/4cdc9b76/4ef1de25/1168084821/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200329.1nd__1133__")**
Thank you,
Team MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903cc/7f51f7bc/4cdc9b76/4ef1de22/1168084821/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200329.1nd__1133__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903cc/7f51f7bc/4cdc9b76/4ef1de24/1168084821/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1133&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903cc/7f51f7bc/4cdc9b76/4ef1de1b/1168084821/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Team Michelle
subject: This campaign's biggest deadline yet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
In just a few days, this campaign will be facing our first ever FEC filing deadline. That means how much we have raised over the last three months is going to be made public, and the numbers we put up will be used to judge the strength of our grassroots team.

Friends, we'll get right to it.

In just a few days, this campaign will be facing our first ever FEC filing deadline. That means how much we have raised over the last three months is going to be made public, and the numbers we put up will be used to judge the strength of our grassroots team.

This deadline is huge. That's why we've set a fundraising goal of $50,000 before Tuesday at midnight to ensure we're in the strongest possible position. We could really use your help.

[**Will you help push us over the finish line before this crucial deadline? Chip in $5 or more before our end-of-quarter deadline on Tuesday.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16651691/177096355/-1341710104?gpsid=22_122_12252&refcode=em20_200329_eoq2_fnd_gq_act__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200329_eoq2_fnd_gq_act__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDAwZjI4MC1lZjcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8q3yrqyUUneDrivP6JVX5CQwQUPIMbxDK3sPjIhii8o=)

Michelle De La Isla will be a different type of leader than we typically see in Congress. We can count on her to put partisan politics aside to do what's best for our families, and she's committed to lifting up the voices of all Kansans when she gets to Washington.

But with the DCCC naming our district one of the biggest battlegrounds in 2020, we know all eyes are going to be on our race. It's important that we hit our FEC goal, so we can show everyone this grassroots team has what it takes to send Michelle to Congress to fight for Kansans.

[**Chip in before our end-of-quarter deadline to help us hit our $50,000 goal >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16651692/177096356/-1341710104?gpsid=22_122_12252&refcode=em20_200329_eoq2_fnd_gq_act__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200329_eoq2_fnd_gq_act__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDAwZjI4MC1lZjcxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8q3yrqyUUneDrivP6JVX5CQwQUPIMbxDK3sPjIhii8o=)

Team Michelle

We can count on her to put partisan politics aside to do what's best for our families, and she's committed to lifting up the voices of all Kansans when she gets to Washington. But with the DCCC naming our district one of the biggest battlegrounds in 2020, we know all eyes are going to be on our race. It's important that we hit our FEC goal, so we can show everyone this grassroots team has what it takes to send Michelle to Congress to fight for Kansans. = Thank you, Team Michelle **=** PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS Michelle for Kansas PO Box 67101 Topeka, KS 66667 Text 'KANSAS' to 31996 to get updates and stay involved in the campaign. name: Cheri Bustos
subject: We can’t take this race for granted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/mA6A9ex_5F5KNHECsGl8q8xP3hcMTO_00hShy4EvmUs=/Fb26nA7rkcIFammD5kUXNahWJ-26cLFBOQ6JxBGZwJg=?refcode=200329-email) _We are grateful to have you on Team Hart! We know that right now many people are facing financial hardships, so if you cannot afford to give today -- that 's okay. We appreciate you opening and reading our campaign updates. If you would like to turn off these emails for a bit, then you can do so [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/mA6A9ex_5F5KNHECsGl8q8xP3hcMTO_00hShy4EvmUs=/yQt8AY9pAu_eIPV7jmrv01YcysMrMnWH0RoxeLxHvAA=)._
* * *
I'm so pleased to support Rita Hart in her crusade to keep IA-02 blue. Iowa's Second District is right across the river from my own, so I've had a front seat look at Rita's amazing campaign. She's fighting every day to keep this seat blue so she can work for affordable health care, quality education, and rural economic development, but recent polling shows that the race is still a tossup. **[I need your help to elect Rita so we can protect our Democratic House majority. Donate $25 or more right now so when her numbers go public at the end of the month, we can show just how much support and momentum is behind her.](https://act.myngp.com/el/mA6A9ex_5F5KNHECsGl8q8xP3hcMTO_00hShy4EvmUs=/5MzGP5BT6sHjlGmZRFKLXj3aUUKOf5pawp9cW70irjw=?refcode=200329-email&amount=25)** We can't let this district flip towards someone who would slash funding from the things we hold dear -- health care, education, Social Security and more. Rita knows the heart and soul of the communities in IA-02 because she spends so much time listening to their stories and concerns. And I sincerely look forward to working with Rita, a farmer and teacher who truly believes in delivering for her constituents, in Washington. But first, we need to make sure she gets there, and that's not a guarantee. **[I'm calling on you on behalf of all Democrats to donate today to help Rita continue the legacy of IA-02's effective Democratic leadership. Even just $15 will help this campaign fight off conservative dark money groups.](https://act.myngp.com/el/mA6A9ex_5F5KNHECsGl8q8xP3hcMTO_00hShy4EvmUs=/5MzGP5BT6sHjlGmZRFKLXj3aUUKOf5pawp9cW70irjw=?refcode=200329-email&amount=15)** Thanks for standing with Rita, Cheri Bustos | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
---
Rita Hart for Iowa
P.O. Box 333
Wheatland IA 52777 United States

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: We're announcing Warren Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
This year, we'll be working to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot. Yes, we need to win the White House, and we need to keep the House, take back the Senate, and win a whole bunch of state... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525780/45c30650/1f7310ac7/66e97600/4136299369/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'm no longer running for president of the United States.

But our grassroots movement was never just about winning one election.

In Pennsylvania and across the country, people have come together to fight side by side for big, structural change -- not for me, but for _each other_. That fight goes on.

**So we 're announcing Warren Democrats to power that fight.**

Warren Democrats is a movement for everybody who believes in the power of bold, inclusive reform to root out corruption in government and put power in the hands of the people.

Right now, that means working to ensure we put people first in solving the coronavirus outbreak and the economic crisis in the short term -- and rebuilding our economy in the long term.

This movement will not only support my re-election campaign for Senate, but will also support other Democratic candidates who share our vision, mobilize people to support those candidates and our ideas, and continue to build the grassroots movement that you've started.

**[If you're fired up to stay in this fight, sign up today to join us.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525780/45c30650/1f7310ac7/66e97603/4136299369/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVAzMlBfQU5OX0xBVV9FXzIwMjAwMzI5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/warren-democrats-join?source=EMP32P_ANN_LAU_E_20200329_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

This year, we'll be working to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot. Yes, we need to win the White House, and we need to keep the House, take back the Senate, and win a whole bunch of state legislative races.

But we can't wait until November to begin delivering solutions for people who are hurting right now.

**As we 've already seen, this crisis has put a spotlight on a number of existing structural issues: how our federal government operates and who it works for, the fragility of an economy that is skewed against working people, and the importance of universal health care and paid leave not just in times of crisis, but in our everyday lives.**

The solutions we advocate for now can and should have a lasting impact on our economy and our government. America can come out of this crisis stronger than before -- but only if we rally around bold solutions, rather than temporary fixes and short-term deals.

So when a greedy corporation is trying to rig the system and cheat working people, we'll speak out.

When Democrats are running on strong progressive values, we'll shine a spotlight on them.

And whenever the door is open -- even just a crack -- for real, systematic reform -- we'll shove our shoulders into that door, push it open all the way, and give the fight everything we've got.

But understand this: Because we're fighting to put power in the hands of the people, we'll still have plenty of people standing in our way. Big banks and powerful special interests don't want you and me to stay in the fight. They want us to lick our wounds, hide in a corner, whimper, and whine.

I'm not going to give them the satisfaction. I'm going to keep fighting back -- and I hope you will, too.

I'm deeply grateful for the chance to keep up the fight alongside you and families across the country as the senior senator from Massachusetts. And I know we have the opportunity to keep pushing for the big, structural change our government, economy, and democracy still sorely need.

**[I'll always be honored to fight by your side. Add your name right now to say that you're staying in this fight all the way.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525780/45c30650/1f7310ac7/66e97603/4136299369/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVAzMlBfQU5OX0xBVV9FXzIwMjAwMzI5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/warren-democrats-join?source=EMP32P_ANN_LAU_E_20200329_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thank you, as always, for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**SIGN UP**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525780/45c30650/1f7310ac7/66e97603/4136299369/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVAzMlBfQU5OX0xBVV9FXzIwMjAwMzI5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/warren-democrats-join?source=EMP32P_ANN_LAU_E_20200329_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
| | | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525780/45c30650/1f7310ac7/66e97602/4136299369/VEsD/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525780/45c30650/1f7310ac7/66e97605/4136299369/VEsA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525780/45c30650/1f7310ac7/66e97604/4136299369/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525780/45c30650/1f7310ac7/66e97607/4136299369/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525780/45c30650/1f7310ac7/66e97606/4136299369/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525780/45c30650/1f7310ac7/66e97609/4136299369/VEsHBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: Kunal, Team Christy
subject: I couldn't believe it when I saw these tweets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | _The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

Peter,

While Christy has been working tirelessly as a state legislator to get things done for Californians, Mike Garcia has been spending his time tweeting from a shadow account, "Scary Christy Smith."

Christy has been working tirelessly to provide Californians with the resources including passing a relief package with $500 million of emergency support.

Meanwhile, Mike Garcia is retweeting a downright childish account about Christy's record -- calling her "dysfunctional" and "scary."

**Well, what's scary is the prospect of having Mike Garcia as our representative.** During a time of crisis, he's not acting like a leader at all.

**[Make sure we defeat Mike Garcia by contributing $5 or whatever you can to Christy's campaign today and help us hit our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e9/29776869/a195e75/569fb9d2/1707288800/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjlfRU9RMi1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200329_EOQ2-s3")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e9/29776869/a195e75/569fb9d3/1707288800/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjlfRU9RMi1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200329_EOQ2-s3&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e9/29776869/a195e75/569fb9ac/1707288800/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjlfRU9RMi1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200329_EOQ2-s3&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e9/29776869/a195e75/569fb9ad/1707288800/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjlfRU9RMi1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200329_EOQ2-s3&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e9/29776869/a195e75/569fb9ae/1707288800/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjlfRU9RMi1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200329_EOQ2-s3&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e9/29776869/a195e75/569fb9af/1707288800/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjlfRU9RMi1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200329_EOQ2-s3&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e9/29776869/a195e75/569fb9d2/1707288800/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjlfRU9RMi1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200329_EOQ2-s3")
In the California State Legislature, Christy has been working to make sure students, families, and workers have the help they need to get through this pandemic -- from assistance on mortgage payments to loans for small business owners, she's been hard at work to mitigate the struggles that are going to come from this crisis. She works with members across the aisle to get things done for all Californians -- and she'll keep that up in Congress.

If Mike Garcia considers these policies "dysfunctional," well then... what does he consider functional?

Maybe he should spend less time on his shadow Twitter accounts and more time helping people.

**[It's time for Mike to grow up -- and time for you (if you can right now) to donate to Christy, the adult in the race. Help us hit our big end-of-quarter goal.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e9/29776869/a195e75/569fb9d2/1707288800/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMjlfRU9RMi1zMyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200329_EOQ2-s3")**

Thanks so much -- stay safe out there.

\-- Kunal

Kunal Atit
Deputy Campaign Manager

clean_body: | []() | | The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win. Peter, While Christy has been working tirelessly as a state legislator to get things done for Californians, Mike Garcia has been spending his time tweeting from a shadow account, "Scary Christy Smith." Christy has been working tirelessly to provide Californians with the resources including passing a relief package with $500 million of emergency support. Meanwhile, Mike Garcia is retweeting a downright childish account about Christy's record -- calling her "dysfunctional" and "scary." Well, what's scary is the prospect of having Mike Garcia as our representative. During a time of crisis, he's not acting like a leader at all. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" "" | "" In the California State Legislature, Christy has been working to make sure students, families, and workers have the help they need to get through this pandemic -- from assistance on mortgage payments to loans for small business owners, she's been hard at work to mitigate the struggles that are going to come from this crisis. She works with members across the aisle to get things done for all Californians -- and she'll keep that up in Congress. If Mike Garcia considers these policies "dysfunctional," well then... what does he consider functional? Maybe he should spend less time on his shadow Twitter accounts and more time helping people. "" Thanks so much -- stay safe out there. \-- Kunal Kunal Atit Deputy Campaign Manager | | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress. ---|--- |

| | Friends,

I’m really grateful to all of you for supporting me, for being part of my team in this important time. I also recognize this time is difficult for everyone, and we are all having to adjust to a different way of day-to-day life.

I’m not going to pretend this is a normal or good time for everyone. But I do know this - **we will get through it,**_** together.**_

I know that you have **a lot of things to occupy your attention **right now and I _won’t take much of your time . . . _
**Would you be able to help with my end of quarter
fundraising deadline with a small contribution?**
I promise, _**even $1 helps if everyone gets in on it.**_

body:
Eugene’s leadership has inspired people across the district, and it’s why we’ve managed to build the best people-powered campaign in the country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16656125/177141617/464986751?refcode=em_fr_2020.03.29_b1_r_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzk5YzgzZS0wMTcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4G7Zy0enshSla3qyxJbmpY1bID43QiajG9KP5FhpDE=) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. name: Team Tina
subject: We have to do some things differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi there, our team is reaching out to you today to update you on our campaign. It’s important, so we hope you can spare a minute or two and let us explain something. We are in the throes of an unprecedented public health emergency — impacting folks across the country and all over the world in ways most of us could have never imagined. How our small businesses, schools, places of worship, and our workplaces operate has changed. Our day-to-day lives have changed. And the kind of campaign we are running has changed, too. For our campaign, this crisis has meant finding new and creative ways to continue our work by moving our efforts online. It’s the right thing to do, and our team has done our best to adapt quickly to this shift. **Even though we’re running things a little differently now, we’re still in this fight for the same reasons and we hope you are, too.** We have so much work to do on the issues that matter to all of us — from protecting and expanding affordable health care to raising the minimum wage to fighting for universal paid sick leave. The list grows by the day. Folks like you have supported our campaign since the very beginning because you believe our country needs to come together to face the critical issues impacting all of us and deliver the change Americans are hungry for. **So, if it makes sense for you financially, our team is asking you to make a contribution to our campaign today. It’s never been more important to elect a government that works for regular folks. clean_body: | Hi there, our team is reaching out to you today to update you on our campaign. It’s important, so we hope you can spare a minute or two and let us explain something. We are in the throes of an unprecedented public health emergency — impacting folks across the country and all over the world in ways most of us could have never imagined. How our small businesses, schools, places of worship, and our workplaces operate has changed. Our day-to-day lives have changed. And the kind of campaign we are running has changed, too. For our campaign, this crisis has meant finding new and creative ways to continue our work by moving our efforts online. It’s the right thing to do, and our team has done our best to adapt quickly to this shift. Even though we’re running things a little differently now, we’re still in this fight for the same reasons and we hope you are, too. We have so much work to do on the issues that matter to all of us — from protecting and expanding affordable health care to raising the minimum wage to fighting for universal paid sick leave. The list grows by the day. Folks like you have supported our campaign since the very beginning because you believe our country needs to come together to face the critical issues impacting all of us and deliver the change Americans are hungry for. So, if it makes sense for you financially, our team is asking you to make a contribution to our campaign today. It’s never been more important to elect a government that works for regular folks. Our hope is that you will give Tina the opportunity to continue doing right by you in the Senate. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We appreciate any contribution you are able to make, but we only want you to pitch in if you can afford to. This is no ordinary time, and we need you to take care of yourself and your loved ones first. Thank you for anything you are able to give. Even if you can’t, we are grateful you opened this email in the first place. We really mean it. — Team Tina P.S. We know this is a difficult time for everyone, so please stay safe out there. name: Taylor Klos (mjfortexas.com)
subject: Quarterly goal met? Not yet.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We've had to change plans and strategies on the fly.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ce/7f51f7bc/4cd1434b/4ef1de1f/867520569/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ce/7f51f7bc/4cd1434b/4ef1de1e/867520569/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200329.2nd__1126__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Hey Peter, as you can see, **we haven 't hit our end-of-quarter goal yet. The good news is we still have time.**

The coronavirus pandemic has shaken a lot of things up for our campaign. To keep Texans safe and healthy, we've had to suspend our in-person events and shift to digital campaigning for the foreseeable future.

**[That means that right now, we're relying on grassroots online donors to help MJ win this runoff and go on to beat Sen. Cornyn. We need to hit our $75,000 end-of-quarter goal by Tuesday. Can you chip in?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ce/7f51f7bc/4cd1434b/4ef1de1e/867520569/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200329.2nd__1126__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Our campaign has had to change plans and strategies on the fly, but we know that's nothing compared to the struggles of families across Texas whose lives have been upended by this pandemic. If you can't donate right now, we understand.

**[If you are able to pitch in (even a few bucks)](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ce/7f51f7bc/4cd1434b/4ef1de1e/867520569/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200329.2nd__1126__&amount=10&recurring=true"), it could make all the difference as we prepare to win the runoff in July and send Sen. John Cornyn packing in November.

We've met our last few quarterly goals, and with your help we know we can raise $75,000 by Tuesday's deadline to do it again.

[Let's make it happen.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ce/7f51f7bc/4cd1434b/4ef1de1e/867520569/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200329.2nd__1126__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

\-- Taylor Klos, TX Finance Director

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ce/7f51f7bc/4cd1434b/4ef1de1e/867520569/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200329.2nd__1126__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ce/7f51f7bc/4cd1434b/4ef1de1d/867520569/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1126&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903ce/7f51f7bc/4cd1434b/4ef1de1c/867520569/VEsO/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Margaret Good
subject: The new reality for our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://margaretgood.com [https://margaretgood.com]
Dear Team,

Florida’s 16th District deserves strong, new leadership that prioritizes protecting and caring for everyone in our community. The crisis we’re facing should only serve to strengthen this vision not diminish it.

Industries, operations, and everyday routines have been brought to a halt across the country as we work to curb the spread of this virus. To protect our fellow Floridians and to do our part to help flatten the curve, we’ve suspended all in-person events and we’re reconfiguring this campaign to connect with voters virtually.

There’s so much uncertainty pervading our lives right now and I know how difficult it is to focus elsewhere. But here’s one thing that hasn’t changed: we have an election later this year that will impact Southwest Florida for years to come.

In just a few short days, the first quarter of the year ends, and for the first time in 2020, my campaign’s finances will be made available to my opponent, pundits, and the public. We need to do everything we can to show our continued strength and support. With your help, I know we will continue to grow our movement and bring strong Democratic leadership to Southwest Florida.

The way we campaign may look different in the coming months, but our goal remains the same. If you’re able to amidst these trying times, please contribute whatever you can so we can stay on track to elect bold Democratic leadership to Congress this November.

SUPPORT OUR GRASSROOTS MOVEMENT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/MGFL-16-Email-March2020-FR-EOQ1?refcode=E1939-20200329-EOQ1-SB&amount=25]

Thank you for sticking with me--I hope you’re staying safe and healthy. Together, we will get through this.
-- Margaret Good

name: Team Tomlinson
subject: How should a Senator act in a moment of crisis?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
David Perdue had a chance to protect us from COVID-19, friends. He failed. | |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16657140/177155402/2013293945?refcode=em032920-header-pm&refcode2=2c7dc28d-0672-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzdkYzI4ZC0wNjcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70dIi1praX7IRRhRuBJu8c4SeDLs2tjE2o8Syrdj2Hw=) **** | | David Perdue had a chance to protect us from COVID-19, friends. He failed.

When Teresa was mayor of Columbus, Georgia, she didn’t wait until a crisis got national attention before taking action. Give us a moment to explain.

Columbus is adjacent to Fort Benning, which supports some 100,000 active-duty military, family members, reserves, veterans, and civilians.

Teresa drilled countless times in crisis simulation as Columbus’ public safety director and head of Homeland Security to keep her city safe. She worked alongside the federal and state government, Fort Benning’s commanding generals, and community stakeholders to be ready when disaster struck. Preparedness is a critical component of leadership.

So is vision. When Teresa took office in 2010, she knew Columbus had a problem with veteran homelessness and she was determined to make a plan to address it. By the end of her second term in 2019, Columbus reached net-zero veteran homelessness, with an available housing unit for every single homeless veteran in the city. **Teresa confronted a crisis affecting some of the most vulnerable people in her city and solved it.**

**The COVID-19 pandemic shows how important it is that we elect a Senator who understands government’s power comes from the people she serves. Invest in good leadership and you will get good government.**

**[We have an FEC deadline in 2 days. With Teresa as our nominee, we will defeat David Perdue and flip Georgia blue — but we need your help. Make a contribution and help elect the kind of leader we deserve in the United States Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16657141/177155403/2013293945?refcode=em032920-pm&refcode2=2c7dc28d-0672-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzdkYzI4ZC0wNjcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70dIi1praX7IRRhRuBJu8c4SeDLs2tjE2o8Syrdj2Hw=)** | |

clean_body: David Perdue had a chance to protect us from COVID-19, friends. He failed. | | | | = ** | | David Perdue had a chance to protect us from COVID-19, friends. He failed. When Teresa was mayor of Columbus, Georgia, she didn’t wait until a crisis got national attention before taking action. Give us a moment to explain. Columbus is adjacent to Fort Benning, which supports some 100,000 active-duty military, family members, reserves, veterans, and civilians. Teresa drilled countless times in crisis simulation as Columbus’ public safety director and head of Homeland Security to keep her city safe. She worked alongside the federal and state government, Fort Benning’s commanding generals, and community stakeholders to be ready when disaster struck. Preparedness is a critical component of leadership. So is vision. When Teresa took office in 2010, she knew Columbus had a problem with veteran homelessness and she was determined to make a plan to address it. By the end of her second term in 2019, Columbus reached net-zero veteran homelessness, with an available housing unit for every single homeless veteran in the city. Teresa confronted a crisis affecting some of the most vulnerable people in her city and solved it. The COVID-19 pandemic shows how important it is that we elect a Senator who understands government’s power comes from the people she serves. name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: A virus more dangerous than COVID-19
body:
Peter,
Financial relief is finally on the way to many Americans who are struggling due to the COVID-19 crisis. Yet, it will take a lot longer for Americans to recover from the fear the Coronavirus has sparked in many peoples’ hearts.
I take this pandemic seriously and you should as well. But statistically, your risk of getting the virus is still remote and the risk of dying from it is minimal, but there is a virus that we hear almost nothing about these days, and it is absolutely going to touch you. In fact, the death rate from it is 100%.
I speak of the virus of sin; an infection that has been passed on since the beginning of human existence. It’s a virus that we all have and are born with. The Bible says it this way—ALL have sinned and come short of the glory of God. And sadly, every single one of us will actually die from it. Again, the message of the Bible is that “The wages of sin is death...”
**That’s pretty dismal and sounds hopeless. But while we can’t stop the earthly consequences of the sin virus, the rest of that verse tells us there is a cure.**
“For the wages of sin may be death, but the GIFT of God is eternal life through Jesus Christ our Lord." The cure is blood-based; the blood of a Savior that cures the sin virus for its eternal effect.
**I say this not to be preachy, but to remind you that even in the midst of some of the most frightening days of our nation’s history - and while understanding that many will have a hard time of paying bills, holding a job, or finishing school, or visiting elderly relatives - there is hope.**
There is light in the midst of the darkness, and even if you avoid coronavirus, you need to take steps to protect yourself from an even more deadly virus, but one that already has a cure and a cure that costs you nothing but your willingness to accept it.
**As Christians, many of us have already accepted this free gift, but we have a golden opportunity to share it with others and tell them about the hope that we have in the Lord.**
My prayer is that this virus would not leave the imprint of economic hardship, or fear, but instead that it would cause hearts to come to God, people to care more for their neighbors, and families to be strengthened as they spend time together.
Will you join me in this prayer?
Thank you, Peter, for your faithfulness during this time. All of us at My Faith Votes are grateful for you.
We believe that when we bring the powerful solution of our faith to others, to our communities, and to the voting booth, we will be a force for good in our nation.
**United. We Stand.**
Mike

[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200329com01&n=1)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200329com01&n=2).

name: Charles Booker
subject: Will you give me your personal endorsement?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Your support is what matters the most to me — the only way we’re going to defeat Mitch is if we build a people-powered movement ready to fight for real, progressive change.
#
This is a long email about what we’re fighting for this election. **I hope you’ll read the entire thing and then give your personal endorsement for our campaign. **
Your support is what matters the most to me — the only way we’re going to defeat Mitch is if we build a people-powered movement ready to fight for real, progressive change.
**[We’d especially love to have an endorsement come from your community — please add your name to stand with us in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16657876/177163246/-1834895831?source=em20200329-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFhZWUyOS0wYjcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_xbdfNI--ivXFzn2Ke34p2HLRLhWqfcCENHhTxqZas=&emci=46a36d77-f771-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=ac1aee29-0b72-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)**
****[ADD YOUR PERSONAL ENDORSEMENT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16657877/177163247/-1834895831?source=em20200329-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFhZWUyOS0wYjcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_xbdfNI--ivXFzn2Ke34p2HLRLhWqfcCENHhTxqZas=&emci=46a36d77-f771-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=ac1aee29-0b72-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)****
I’m going to share with you something most candidates won’t admit.
**I know we’re probably going to be out-spent in this primary.** There’s going to be a huge financial gap between me and my opponent because the establishment decided to meddle in our race before the people of Kentucky even had a chance to speak for themselves.
**But I don’t believe having the most money makes you qualified to beat Mitch.**
For years, we’ve witnessed Democrats with a warchest of resources fall short against McConnell because they failed to talk about the issues that matter most to Kentuckians and ran middle-of-the-road campaigns.
_We’re not making that mistake._ Together we’re building a progressive movement that reflects the desires and needs of working-class families across our state. We’re fighting for solutions like Medicare for All and a Green New Deal because it’s time to pass policies that are as big as the problems we face.
**[If you agree that people are hungry for real change, will you endorse our grassroots campaign today? I’ll remember you as one of the first supporters who stood with me in the beginning of this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16657878/177163248/-1834895831?source=em20200329-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFhZWUyOS0wYjcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_xbdfNI--ivXFzn2Ke34p2HLRLhWqfcCENHhTxqZas=&emci=46a36d77-f771-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=ac1aee29-0b72-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)**
****[ADD YOUR PERSONAL ENDORSEMENT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16657879/177163249/-1834895831?source=em20200329-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFhZWUyOS0wYjcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_xbdfNI--ivXFzn2Ke34p2HLRLhWqfcCENHhTxqZas=&emci=46a36d77-f771-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=ac1aee29-0b72-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)****
Mitch knows that his seat has never been so vulnerable and that our progressive movement is rising.
**That’s why he’s running scared right now.**
More people than ever are recognizing the fact that we deserve better and we have the power to change that.
_We deserve Senators who prioritize our interests and needs, not their own political agendas.
We deserve a health care system that looks at us like human beings and not potential profits.
We deserve a fair shot at making a living and being able to make ends meet._
We’re closer than ever at making this change happen. First, we need to keep organizing and make sure our movement is united. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you for the first time asking for your personal endorsement. **
**[Giving your personal endorsement is a powerful sign of what this campaign is all about and will always remind me who I’m fighting for this election: you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16657880/177163250/-1834895831?source=em20200329-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFhZWUyOS0wYjcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_xbdfNI--ivXFzn2Ke34p2HLRLhWqfcCENHhTxqZas=&emci=46a36d77-f771-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=ac1aee29-0b72-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)**
In solidarity,
Charles

clean_body: Your support is what matters the most to me — the only way we’re going to defeat Mitch is if we build a people-powered movement ready to fight for real, progressive change. This is a long email about what we’re fighting for this election. I hope you’ll read the entire thing and then give your personal endorsement for our campaign. Your support is what matters the most to me — the only way we’re going to defeat Mitch is if we build a people-powered movement ready to fight for real, progressive change. ** I’m going to share with you something most candidates won’t admit. I know we’re probably going to be out-spent in this primary. There’s going to be a huge financial gap between me and my opponent because the establishment decided to meddle in our race before the people of Kentucky even had a chance to speak for themselves. But I don’t believe having the most money makes you qualified to beat Mitch. For years, we’ve witnessed Democrats with a warchest of resources fall short against McConnell because they failed to talk about the issues that matter most to Kentuckians and ran middle-of-the-road campaigns. We’re not making that mistake. Together we’re building a progressive movement that reflects the desires and needs of working-class families across our state. We’re fighting for solutions like Medicare for All and a Green New Deal because it’s time to pass policies that are as big as the problems we face. Mitch knows that his seat has never been so vulnerable and that our progressive movement is rising. That’s why he’s running scared right now. More people than ever are recognizing the fact that we deserve better and we have the power to change that. We deserve Senators who prioritize our interests and needs, not their own political agendas. We deserve a health care system that looks at us like human beings and not potential profits. We deserve a fair shot at making a living and being able to make ends meet. We’re closer than ever at making this change happen. First, we need to keep organizing and make sure our movement is united. That’s why I’m reaching out to you for the first time asking for your personal endorsement. In solidarity, Charles =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
subject: 👊Will You Fight Back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Peter, we can just let them get away with this... * | | |
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Dear Peter, Last month I shared with you that even though he dropped out of the presidential race... [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SSYMfg&mc=9S&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=O&z=EFY0BD4&) ..."Mini Mike" Bloomberg is still committed to spending $2 BILLION to defeat President Trump this Election! **And he just kicked off that promise by dumping**$18,000,000** into the Democratic National Committee's coffers for the express purpose of **DESTROYING** President Trump.** As I told you, the Democrats and Bloomberg are targeting key swing states where just a few percentage points in the wrong direction will spell President Trump's -- _and other good Conservatives'_ \-- defeat. But little do they know that we've been airing our highly-effective, issues-based radio ads directly to Black and Minority voters in those same battleground states _since August_. **But in order to keep our hard-hitting radio ads ON THE AIR in minority neighborhoods throughout these CRITICAL battleground states,_we MUST raise $16,280 each month_!** That's the price to keep these ads up-and-running for one entire month in Alabama, California, Iowa, Maine, Michigan, Minnesota and New Mexico --- _all carefully selected for high percentage of minority voters, a battleground state, and/or to defeat a radical socialist who hates America_! Peter, if we're going to win in November... WE MUST STAY ON THE AIR AND EXPAND INTO OTHER BATTLEGROUND STATES IMMEDIATELY! Yes, we can STOP Bloomberg and re-elect President Trump, but we need your IMMEDIATE help to keep our ads on the air and reach even more minority voters. **The payment for April is DUE NOW...** [Please respond today with your most generous contribution.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SSYMfg&mc=9S&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=O&z=Ew4eF3n&) Make no mistake about it, the 2020 election is going to come down to the wire. And we need your help to FIGHT BACK against Bloomberg and the Democrats --- and give President Trump four more years to Make America Great Again. [Please do what you can!](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SSYMfg&mc=9S&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=O&z=EEjO9aa&) | | _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_
---|---

Stars & Stripes Forever PAC (C) 2020\. All rights reserved.
_Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee._
National Headquarters | P.O. Box 1351 | Merrifield, VA 22116-1351
[www.StarsAndStripesForeverPAC.org](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SSYMfg&mc=9S&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=O&z=EQzdI72&)
---

You're receiving this email because you are committed to protecting America from rabid liberals hell-bent on destroying conservative values.
If you are giving up on this critical fight, please UNSUBSCRIBE below.
| | Stars & Stripes Forever PAC, PO Box 1351, 22116, Merrifield, United States
---
You may [unsubscribe](https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=3wgHm&mc=9S&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=6&z=EBNOh1M&pt=unsubscribe) or [change your contact details](https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=3wgHm&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=4&z=Et8Eku&pt=change_details) at any time.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I never imagined sending an email like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| Hello --

I never imagined sending an email like this, but our country is facing an unprecedented public health emergency. Our schools, our places of worship, and many businesses are closed as we do our civic duty to slow the outbreak of the coronavirus.

So, I need to be honest with you: just as this pandemic has surely impacted you and your family, it has impacted our campaign, too.

We've canceled our in-person fundraisers. Our average online contribution has unsurprisingly dropped in the last week. And my campaign manager is working overtime to rework our paid media budget, just as Mitch McConnell's super PAC booked millions of dollars in ads to help our opponent.

This crisis will require a different kind of campaign to flip Colorado's Senate seat blue -- one that none of us could have imagined just a few short weeks ago. That means messages like this are more important to winning this election than ever before.

We can't win this election without a lot of folks who are able stepping up for our team in the coming weeks, which is why I'm personally asking:

**[Please, can I count on you to donate $10 or more right now? If you can spare it, your contribution before our FEC deadline will ensure my team has the resources they need to respond to the attacks from McConnell's super PAC:](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4f30/4bd7760e/591149ba/77af990a/1536874582/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_hick?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMEPlease+can+I+count+on+you+to+do&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200328_6MO-1MNTL_none_STD_1_Hicksend&source=314_EM_FR_200328_6MO-1MNTL_none_STD_1_Hicksend&refcode=314_EM_FR_200328_6MO-1MNTL_none_STD_1_Hicksend")** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between 314 Action Fundand John Hickenlooper and be process immediately.

name: Sandy Smith
subject: I need a bit more help...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gG5ajbMeopNxmng&b=5sjEj6IQqu0P0IA6LtxlZg)
---
Dear Peter,
I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

I'll keep this short- because I need** [_YOUR help urgently_](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gG5ajbMeopNxmng&b=5sjEj6IQqu0P0IA6LtxlZg) to retake this key swing seat from the Dems. **

**We have a REAL chance here, and we can't let it slip away. You think Pelosi ignores swing districts like mine? She doesn't- they compete in every one. And we must do the same. **

_Will you help me beat Democrat G.K. Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of one of her lieutenants?_

I apologize for being short, but we have only two days left. **I have a big fundraising deadline at the end of this month, I must raise $50,000 to keep pace with my radical Dem opponent. I have only $6,350 to go against my goal!**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gG5ajbMeopNxmng&b=5sjEj6IQqu0P0IA6LtxlZg), with your maximum contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000, or even $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

**This deadline is huge for us. You've already seen what will happen if Nancy Pelosi keeps Congress.**

It's time to fight back - together! [Can you help me?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gG5ajbMeopNxmng&b=5sjEj6IQqu0P0IA6LtxlZg)

name: Team Cory
subject: Add your name to thank all workers during the COVID-19 crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
An easy way to show our appreciation |
#
Friends, We're going to keep this email short and to the point: frontline workers across the country are putting it on the line every day to provide critical services while we work through the COVID-19 crisis and its effects on our country. **[While Cory's fighting in the Senate for better benefits and working conditions for all workers, today we're doing something simple but impactful: thanking workers who are fighting on the front lines of this crisis. Will you add your name to our card to show your gratitude to all workers who are required to keep working through this crisis?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-the-card-frontline-workers?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=1+-+While+Coryrsquos+fighting+in+the+Senate+&utm_campaign=em200329&source=em200329")** | [SIGN THE CARD](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-the-card-frontline-workers?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+THE+CARD&utm_campaign=em200329&source=em200329")
---
Health care workers like doctors, nurses, and pharmacists. First responders. Domestic workers including housekeepers, nannies, and in-home care workers. Grocery store clerks. Food service employees. Cleaning staffs. And so many more. All who are showing up to work every day so the rest of us can stay safe and prioritize taking care of ourselves and our loved ones.
**In moments of crisis, it 's these folks who remind us of the enduring strength and love for each other that defines us as Americans.**
**[Make sure to sign the card, then forward this email to five friends who want to say thanks, too. We're hoping to put together a big list of everyone who signs, so make sure to get your name on the card today.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-the-card-frontline-workers?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=3+-+Make+sure+to+sign+the+card+then+forward+&utm_campaign=em200329&source=em200329")**
[SIGN THE CARD](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-the-card-frontline-workers?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=4+-+SIGN+THE+CARD&utm_campaign=em200329&source=em200329")
---
Stay safe.
Team Cory

**Here are important resources to refer to during this public health emergency:
[www.cdc.gov/coronavirus](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f81/5fca0d19/7a4c7012/291d188f/1892201780/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=5+-+wwwcdcgovcoronavirus&utm_campaign=em200329&source=em200329")
[www.covid19.nj.gov](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f81/5fca0d19/7a4c7012/291d188e/1892201780/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://www.covid19.nj.gov?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=6+-+wwwcovid19njgov&utm_campaign=em200329&source=em200329")
[www.jobs.covid19.nj.gov](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f81/5fca0d19/7a4c7012/291d188d/1892201780/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://www.jobs.covid19.nj.gov?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=7+-+wwwjobscovid19njgov&utm_campaign=em200329&source=em200329")**

We know this is a difficult time for many folks.
If you'd like to receive fewer emails during this public health crisis, [**please click here**. ](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f81/5fca0d19/7a4c7012/291d188c/1892201780/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=8+-+please+click+here+&utm_campaign=em200329&source=em200329")

PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
---
