name: Lisa Scheller
subject: NEED YOUR HELP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
We’re currently facing unprecedented times and uncomfortable situations, all in the middle of an election year. The past few weeks have been painful Peter, We’re currently facing unprecedented times and uncomfortable situations, all in the middle of an election year.
The past few weeks have been painful in every facet, but have also reminded me how strong Americans, specifically Pennsylvanians, are.
We are a group of people who believe in one another, want to help our neighbors, and want to see things through completion.
Peter, that’s why I’m emailing you today. We are quickly approaching the first End-of-Quarter deadline on Tuesday for 2020. For those of you unfamiliar, this is when we will have to file our first-quarter donations to the FEC.
Amid all of the uncertainty, the blunt truth is that our campaign must still keep the lights on – we must continue to spread our message. That is why I am humbly asking you to chip in anything you can.
This is a prime vantage point for the Far-Left to take a look at my campaign to see how we’re doing. Peter, simply put, I need your help. **[Chip in 15](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=f5ad1eeb9fbb48a581f401752dda1c5b&_e=eUEjRwSjfkNtZfa0Rs4pK1xjpJ1YdJccFLCDtmUukknL1prE137I3RFGYtP3tnoJANT0JWQ5tEcv1YV-714RutaOKyAEwjJk8CSIQQs1OWL6WcwEh37nzDSnNlNH3oomN8sVKgviBixuWZtAlMBsKCvyGAvg_k6EUd5fVmxc-e49BGBehjZ6bYD7pO8q63qp1UiQdhaDMyCw6uQ5JautS55PsDUYrQwHuiwJpQzOAXSJ-s0u5Fi9b-zisDgu6jHAkf-umtD2F82WqOIgF17qdv85G-baBAluPsyc8RbUDg_YRgkwbJRGSbRtvrZHRUfixA_1HfVDbEyF2FqcUyCF84LJTbdw7ryk2sSQbdjr4UMXpCrPWZV8L-YbEctE4jVpXXegeOUyAbIjwKzPytNYgeS-1ZmTHuPTFtMeswHkb8dT17MyXzP6V4-O3v8Zp1gjDxHNRYCaFp9qcHG3LkXHMA%3D%3D)** **[Chip in 25](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=f5ad1eeb9fbb48a581f401752dda1c5b&_e=eUEjRwSjfkNtZfa0Rs4pK1xjpJ1YdJccFLCDtmUukknL1prE137I3RFGYtP3tnoJANT0JWQ5tEcv1YV-714RuhbENnQC0-dws9Lbpp3ztTfo4JwsC-cYgZyU6q4SSaX1WjNEwN8h4zouqv9jzXa8bKTjS1T3Zx3PalsQZqpeLi870m5OOK9TCLJEzWBSEsDeXenG_2fkc6Qzj_NVvaIgz9R5-Q6PsKGdFtP5dNwOG0aZ3P3e5_hdERoAyudgXdj9S-fNHPeUMRmflN0qGGGk56NwxsDNEwtf0b0exkGRcWXhuzQxHn4hwWKmcWFC-ShXiEGzUQtKC5qtAFc0-GKRvLyebsp_6qdj83TbDaN1S4kCdd95_tTMdC_ZtQBn1lPUiEWqtfn61aFgg76wTWGDe1XtrqeY601Mb9faIfBhR_aa0GQCoWSbRrCkMv-aJr6XDMurEVhCfsn25NM_wwW87g%3D%3D)** **[Chip in 50](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=f5ad1eeb9fbb48a581f401752dda1c5b&_e=eUEjRwSjfkNtZfa0Rs4pK1xjpJ1YdJccFLCDtmUukknL1prE137I3RFGYtP3tnoJANT0JWQ5tEcv1YV-714RupaEI2LXrMrv1ZOCxYgWgW3wMypARPhwnjGl1Dax-4GwEBgtA5vyA2dc1O3Ee3FGutsY4wVZ5iDaF43U-h1ebsu2VzNToaEgHoamKCblNCwQrA5NagGGiGHGrT_VU-TvA7oYQOV5TvRsn2PvBgZEoOa58xeNRJspcIhljigfyi8Npy7GdYUNzuyZwkwyMHrf0iuAFTuurmsWrF2VwhVM_797Tt12vf0L-UtyLtMM0XXRgW0XbywlJ9mpG3OTeP_HqHOWSU35ZLTZxHhtCQCfl1wO1G1y7AEVEM9XKoAb_zqjggen0tyyM9qqOraxAKAj0S0wS9NxVMCJdVbiba5RMzJrzA3iRFPOL2nvrtiUt7Msf0edNANuMCeVrAIJJhTy7Q%3D%3D)** That’s why I’m calling on you, Peter. This quarter’s filing could be our most important yet of this whole election season. I really need you to step up this quarter and help our campaign remain viable, and I’m scared that without your help, we could run into murky waters. [ **CHIP IN TO SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE VALUES IN PA** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=f5ad1eeb9fbb48a581f401752dda1c5b&_e=eUEjRwSjfkNtZfa0Rs4pK1xjpJ1YdJccFLCDtmUukknL1prE137I3RFGYtP3tnoJANT0JWQ5tEcv1YV-714Rupg-x-DaHNGVAzibRNGe1Rr-ta_GxNBDsJriTEoK_xestrGKPTVO_dz3lc7hew4Hj_J_N8LNu7lo86rvxWV_EpI5JZUcXoKuvamlovmKu6dJr5_oGTKaRhfXOcIEXeewA0BhR4Hibz0DPalv3W1ULe0kTjETe8Ar-Iqkq2Y0cpJiVmHsJJkSzS4_bB_l5sVsZEt0khXGfes7-OxTlvdjt-4tXLtCPHN73UE3xc4ZqV-gevUmBExX5NacmvYatgTYO7AiFhJ0Ty47Qr8jFm2jnmr0hR_2leDDl16xHR4gAuC9lBmp5A46zlHuFTkK1gJ1HVNmQk3LRyU7b0n-QF232lGo2Bb5zsSUkNnx9AKoxKWi) Peter, I have no problem admitting that I need your help--that my campaign needs your help.

Amid all of the uncertainty, the blunt truth is that our campaign must still keep the lights on – we must continue to spread our message. That is why I am humbly asking you to chip in anything you can. This is a prime vantage point for the Far-Left to take a look at my campaign to see how we’re doing. Peter, simply put, I need your help. That’s why I’m calling on you, Peter. This quarter’s filing could be our most important yet of this whole election season. I really need you to step up this quarter and help our campaign remain viable, and I’m scared that without your help, we could run into murky waters. Peter, I have no problem admitting that I need your help--that my campaign needs your help. We’re counting on you, Peter. Thank you, Lisa Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

subject: Words Used to Describe Massie
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f08a366cca43/exclusive-new-ad-alert-6417076?e=5ac6ff05c3)
---
| |
---
| | There have been a lot of words used to describe Thomas Massie this week.

**President Trump called him “ a disaster for America, and the Great State of Kentucky.”**

Trump’s Campaign Manager said he was **“ the most disliked person in America.”**

Even soft spoken John Kerry called him an **“ a**hole,”** while the Washington Post called him **“ a monster.”**

Here’s the problem with those adjectives. Not only are they embarrassing for Kentucky’s 4th congressional district, but this perception limits our influence in the nation’s Capitol.

Even if you agree with the libertarian principles Thomas Massie claims to defend, his reputation as “Mr. No” makes it so his policies hit a dead end at every turn.

Thomas Massie is one of the least effective members of Congress - either Republican or Democrat. Since being elected in 2012, he has introduced 31 bills. **NONE** have passed the House. What’s even more alarming, **NONE** have even made it out of committee!

We need a voice in Congress that will let us move the ball down the field on conservative principles - and that is exactly what I will do.

[Please consider a contribution of $250, $50, or even $25](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=5f2771dd44&e=5ac6ff05c3) to help make sure we have a congressman who is able to deliver real results for Kentucky.

Sincerely,
Todd McMurtry

We need a voice in Congress that will let us move the ball down the field on conservative principles - and that is exactly what I will do. to help make sure we have a congressman who is able to deliver real results for Kentucky. Sincerely, Todd McMurtry | "DONATE $25" | "DONATE $50" | "DONATE $250" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 McMurtry for Congress, All rights reserved.

subject: They profit from denying us care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CANNING FOR CONGRESS ](https://u1584542
body:
In his campaign against Doyle, the incumbent has cashed two large checks from a lobbying group for the for profit health insurance industry, that, according to their website: "strongly opposes all forms of single-payer healthcare." That is because they pr | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.30h/NJTxzg_VT9SWvVwhHDvj2Q/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH718ztxMgPvjxqOs7W1EFTjy5iqCy2pZHapmw2Ygr8rerTgguikZhziUO-2F5qDRqrIsNUIclUfBq3XZcY47cI9pcGV-2Bbh-2FPtSiyo4W9EUukUX6xeJjmcd0Jz7Vo2GVxqrqLTumaLAtdTRyCMyYQ9w6m63Zg-3D-3D/q7kR)

Hi Friend, My mom was one of the lucky ones: she worked as a nurse, so she had "good' insurance. But even her "good" insurance wasn't enough to save our family from crippling medical debt. After she had a heart attack, we had to learn to dodge relentless collection calls from the hospital. That is what healthcare in America is today for tens of millions of us, even the "lucky ones." That's why I am running the campaign to elect Doyle Canning to the US Congress - **Because she will never take a dime from the for-profit health insurance industry. ** In his campaign against Doyle, the incumbent has cashed two large checks from a lobbying group for the for profit health insurance industry, that, according to their website: "[s](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.30h/NJTxzg_VT9SWvVwhHDvj2Q/h1/gCUsS-2FHt784NvAOQaJea67Bgu8-2FziFyJZk7NGWFmyCkktwjTXJsTMWqGo3ODW969LmOtEC5xXGno7QdZmTB2LvLxR51en1fI1KnI81F9Z-2FF0WPwXu4t-2BeIoiSoVdkelvFleYnltBZxsLZw75Mh0SUyJsxzcJ8wpo3ewLcMyU0UyRgAq4R1-2Bt5l2Qsa-2FSixVTUCWvuz0uHQZKyUBV4MCqeYzBHTXIhiyTpQP2SMt0sBSEfSoy8js4RkmyO4S9k4iA7cfDro0CElVQZjE49JbnA4HWNiujHY28ooOmOuzqCz-2FHo5YwoNikp0FrRdL3zhwd/_iVK)[trongly opposes all forms of single-payer healthcare](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.30h/NJTxzg_VT9SWvVwhHDvj2Q/h2/gCUsS-2FHt784NvAOQaJea67Bgu8-2FziFyJZk7NGWFmyCkktwjTXJsTMWqGo3ODW969LmOtEC5xXGno7QdZmTB2Ll6ALc9-2BF0SO6bbckzHj1en4H2unvKJHcWRy-2BmfTrQMCztdD4Ya2QYLgfBWLE05YEFTn-2BJIoHnNl9Y35AZi5-2Bu9jnPH7u-2FpWQEPXC4vDSRh-2FAnfOXgvx10hNtE1zJtqX8ipcM-2FOwMf7-2Fc8IdCYJ3JYX4iiZFHgf7sFWDXhRBsDEzWhWR3zL18fVjo7sgwPNUbnu3RK0oCXhNgCEIuZ86p2QvoEdW9Ug1w1kuLYNZq99D/Z6UR)." That is because they profit from denying us care, and driving families like mine into debt. **Medicare for All is the solution we need, now - especially in this pandemic.** And we deserve a Democrat that is 100% committed to fight for us. Our March 31 deadline is almost here. **[Donate today to fight for Healthcare as a Human right!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.30h/NJTxzg_VT9SWvVwhHDvj2Q/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v0RrXTMsgpMVixuEZwp9uPDV7qBTYpWu78fONtzFvAmVBZDjBtEZlno116whfoOPtOLHoJGJ-2BIZU62mvB4HJ0NbQ21NZTLlsSFVxtb1QNtQk7TFj6IVtmSkCDwrSE0KMMT8zo2-2F-2FNDat-2BtMCIC8JmhgFxpYdoRUzMvRNXqZ0rh7hmkp6z7dDQis9xKXVmHyHxbbghNqjOK65DD3zdcbhF-2BNKtv8mZbFKs-2Bj0NP-2Fl70UWo-3D/2D_g)**

Doyle has a vision that everyone can get the care they need and lifesaving medicine regardless of how much money they make or where they live, and that nurses and healthcare providers get paid what they deserve. That is why I am asking you to dig deep and am counting on you to give all you can to Doyle's campaign as we approach our End of Quarter Filing deadline. She is the only candidate willing to take on Big Pharma and the health insurance companies to make sure all of us get the care we need and deserve. clean_body: In his campaign against Doyle, the incumbent has cashed two large checks from a lobbying group for the for profit health insurance industry, that, according to their website: "strongly opposes all forms of single-payer healthcare." That is because they pr | | Hi Friend, My mom was one of the lucky ones: she worked as a nurse, so she had "good' insurance. But even her "good" insurance wasn't enough to save our family from crippling medical debt. After she had a heart attack, we had to learn to dodge relentless collection calls from the hospital. That is what healthcare in America is today for tens of millions of us, even the "lucky ones." That's why I am running the campaign to elect Doyle Canning to the US Congress - Because she will never take a dime from the for-profit health insurance industry. In his campaign against Doyle, the incumbent has cashed two large checks from a lobbying group for the for profit health insurance industry, that, according to their website: "." That is because they profit from denying us care, and driving families like mine into debt. Medicare for All is the solution we need, now - especially in this pandemic. And we deserve a Democrat that is 100% committed to fight for us. Our March 31 deadline is almost here. Doyle has a vision that everyone can get the care they need and lifesaving medicine regardless of how much money they make or where they live, and that nurses and healthcare providers get paid what they deserve. That is why I am asking you to dig deep and am counting on you to give all you can to Doyle's campaign as we approach our End of Quarter Filing deadline. She is the only candidate willing to take on Big Pharma and the health insurance companies to make sure all of us get the care we need and deserve. Onward, Kelly McCurdy, Campaign Manager | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! "Donate to Doyle Canning" | | Sent Via . name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I hate to tell you this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hello -- I'll make this quick. Tuesday at midnight we're going to close the books on our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2020 and will have to report how much we've raised and from how many individual donors. **As you likely know, the media, Mitch McConnell 's super PAC, and the rest of the Republican dark money network are going to pore over these reports trying to find any sign of weakness in our campaign.** Right now, we're behind on our fundraising goal with just a few days left until the deadline closes. The hard truth is that a big reason we might fall short is because we canceled in-person fundraising due to the coronavirus outbreak. I am convinced we can make up the difference before Tuesday's deadline if enough grassroots donors step up in the next 72-hours. But I only want you to chip in if you can afford it: **Please, make a donation of $10 or more before our FEC fundraising deadline that 's coming on Tuesday. Anything you can give today will go a long way toward catching up on our goals and flipping this seat blue:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200329?refcode=em-200326-short-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

When we file our FEC report, I want everyone -- especially Mitch McConnell -- to see what I see: a strong, passionate, and diverse campaign of people who are rallying behind our common values.
If you can afford it, I would very much appreciate your support.
Thank you.
-- John

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Mon, March 30- Join our call with Republican Congressional Candidate Amanda Makki and Congressman Guy Reschenthaler
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress Inc
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/amandamakki/mon-march-30-join-our-call-with-republican-congressional-candidate-amanda-makki-and-congressman-guy-reschenthaler?e=bbeef49760)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
**CANDIDATE CALL**

# _“How to campaign in the era of no
in-person campaigning” _
**Monday, March 30th at 7:00 p.m.**

---
| | | |
---

**Amanda Makki**
Candidate for** ** Florida’s 13th Congressional District

| |
---
**Guy Reschenthaler**
Congressman for Pennsylvania’s 14th Congressional District
Member of the House Judiciary and Foreign Affairs Committees.
| | |
Join Republican Candidate for Florida’s 13th Congressional District, Amanda Makki and Pennsylvania Congressman and former Navy JAG Guy Reschenthaler this Monday at 7:00 p.m. for an off the record conversation on how you campaign in the current political environment of no “in-person campaigning” as well as a campaign update on the Republicans path to take back FL-13 and regain the House majority in November.

**_Congressman Guy Reschenthaler_** Congressman Guy Reschenthaler represents Pennsylvania’s 14th Congressional District and serves on the House Judiciary and Foreign Affairs Committees. Guy graduated from Penn State, The Behrend College, and completed law school at Duquesne University. After law school, Guy joined the U.S. Navy Judge Advocate General Corps and volunteered for duty in Iraq. Guy prosecuted some of Iraq’s most dangerous terrorists and also successfully defended a Navy SEAL falsely accused of mishandling the Butcher of Fallujah. Stateside, he served as a Navy lawyer in Norfolk, Va. and then in Texas and Oklahoma, where he was the first uniformed military officer ever to share in the prestigious Michael Taylor Shelby Award, given annually by the Southern District of Texas Chapter of the Federal Bar Association for outstanding ethics and professionalism. Guy worked in private practice at a multi-state law firm and was elected Magisterial District Judge, winning the nomination of both parties. Congressman Reschenthaler previously served in the Pennsylvania State Senate **_Congressional Candidate Amanda Makki_**
Makki and her family escaped an oppressive religious regime in Iran, known for its persecution of non-Muslims and silencing of non-believers, to come to America when she was just an infant. With the little resources they could quickly scrape together, they escaped to the Land of Opportunity, where anyone with a dream and a good work ethic could become successful. Makki’s mother delivered Yellow Pages and was a childcare provider to put Amanda's father through school, where he studied to become an Ear, Nose and Throat Surgeon, and is to this day. Makki witnessed her parents' drive to succeed and commitment to the American Dream, which motivated her to start working at the young age of 15.

Known for her tenacious work ethic from her younger years, Makki started out as a file clerk in a doctor’s office and worked full-time as an office manager and medical biller while earning her college degree. It was through working so closely and empathetically with patients in need that fostered Makki’s desire to serve others. Her passion for service of people evolved into a passion to serve her country; as a Farsi language speaker, Makki was appointed by the George W. Bush Administration to serve the Army General Counsel at the Pentagon weeks after the 9/11/2001 terrorist acts. It was in this role that she began to refine her knowledge of foreign policy. Makki went on to serve as senior advisor in both the U.S. Senate and the U.S. House of Representatives, and before the age of 40, became one of the youngest partners at K&L Gates, one of the nation’s premier law firms. While Makki’s work at K&L Gates focused on health care policy, she also was engaged in the firm’s pro-bono efforts providing assistance through Legal Counsel for the Elderly, a leading provider of free legal services. Amanda Makki is a fisherman, golfer and an avid bike rider on the Pinellas Trail. She has resided in the 13th Congressional District of Florida since 2015. She is active in her faith and worships at Starkey Road Baptist Church.
---

name: =?utf-8?B?VGVhbSBTw6FuY2hleg==?=
subject: Relief for restaurants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
_****_
All across the United States, restaurants are being hit hard by the economic side effects of coronavirus. With thousands of restaurants temporarily closed and restaurant employees subsequently laid off, many in the food service industry need help to stay afloat.
**That 's why the Restaurant Workers' Community Foundation has set up the COVID-19 Emergency Relief Fund to directly support restaurants and restaurant workers. **
[**If you 're in a financially secure place, please show solidarity with restaurant workers across the country by making a donation to the RWCF>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9-PQbBefRkvp8GijVCot7Ugbf5T0QeFjtES6msSuqt0=/TviOq3DP-FlGukt8A0MEYjT6KNXaAJOCZJdIudXv2LA=?refcode=X_032920_RWCF_A)
[_****_](https://act.myngp.com/el/9-PQbBefRkvp8GijVCot7Ugbf5T0QeFjtES6msSuqt0=/f1ED2mzDuKmxnUGclFRaiFckjTpknmXK7aktBOy8tts=?refcode=X_032920_RWCF_A)
The Restaurant Workers' Community Foundation is an advocacy and action nonprofit created by and for restaurant workers. Every donation to RWCF's relief fund will directly help individual restaurant workers and non-profit organizations affiliated with food industry workers, along with providing zero-interest loans for restaurants to get back up and running.

| | Hey Peter, I want to stress how important this $75,000 end-of-quarter goal is. Right now, we're relying heavily on our online grassroots team since all in-person events have been suspended. And the reports that come out next month won't just be the first reports of the runoff period, they'll let us know whether our strategy is working out -- so we _need_ to make sure we're hitting our goal. **[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c8/7f51f7bc/4cd26a49/4ef1de07/3727443035/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200329.3nd__1132__&amount=10&recurring=true")** It's all about setting us up for success through this runoff and showing _everyone_ that our campaign has the strength to take on and defeat Sen. Cornyn. You can bet his big-money attacks will begin soon -- and we need to be ready to fight back.

Y'all have helped us hit every goal we've set so far, and I'm counting on you again to hit this one. **[We need to raise $75,000 by Tuesday to hit our end-of-quarter goal -- can we count on your help?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903c8/7f51f7bc/4cd26a49/4ef1de07/3727443035/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-march-eoq?refcode=email_20200329.3nd__1132__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Tina Smith
subject: Join me in calling on President Trump to ensure shelters and other services for domestic violence survivors.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Friend — While the coronavirus relief bill was a good first step in the fight against this outbreak, make no mistake: There is much more work to do. As more Americans stay home, lose their jobs, fall ill, or face other problems during this crisis, domestic violence survivors are at great risk. We need to make sure survivors continue to have access to vital services and support systems. That includes ensuring shelters and domestic violence service providers get the necessary resources and supplies to keep their sites safe and secure. **[Amid the coronavirus outbreak, we must redouble our efforts to aid our most vulnerable during this crisis. That’s why I’m calling on President Trump to ensure shelters and other services for domestic violence survivors are not cut off — and I’m asking you to join me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16661981/177218290/1645023011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWY1MjA0NC0yNTcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mO-L1FEXRQyXCOEd2V_rz5FoKtvcgWLdDMXJq8wi40s=&emci=24f52044-2572-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=25f52044-2572-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)** | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16661982/177218291/1645023011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWY1MjA0NC0yNTcyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mO-L1FEXRQyXCOEd2V_rz5FoKtvcgWLdDMXJq8wi40s=&emci=24f52044-2572-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=25f52044-2572-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)
---
These are challenging times and there is so much that remains uncertain about the road ahead.
I will continue the important work to deliver the resources our country needs to recover from this pandemic — but I will also make sure we’re doing right by survivors of domestic violence every step of the way.
My hope is that you will join me. Thank you.
— Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

PO Box 14362
St. Paul, MN 55114
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: 🚪 Knock. Knock.
body:
Wash your hands, call your friends, check in on your neighbors.

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489

https://youtu.be/FvsF02uCM-M?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489
Today, the Iowa Department of Public Health (IDPH) has been notified of 64 new positive cases of Iowans with COVID-19, bringing the total to 298. To put that in perspective, there have been 4,375 negative tests to date.

https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4Ts3ih44mFs&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489

Even during this challenging time, it's just as important as ever to retake the House from Nancy Pelosi. See what she tried to pull last week? We need more everyday Iowans in DC who can tell the difference between what's needed and what's pork.
https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489
Hello

I once again want to thank everyone involved in the healthcare field for all you're doing. Your work is crucial to slowing the spread of this virus.

But EVERY IOWAN needs to do their part. Keep your distance from others, wash your hands, and isolate as much as possible.

Iowa is and always will be a agricultural state. We won't be able to put off planting for six to eight weeks. When it's time to plant, everyone will be essential. The world can only eat if Iowa works.

PROTECTING OUR RIGHTS
I get asked by many people if our rights are being taken away from us during this time of crisis. Let me first say that I think the nation's governors are acting in good faith. Most of them seem to be reluctantly doing things that temporarily limit our rights. They are asking for us to follow their guidance rather than using law enforcement to clamp down on us citizens.

Last week, Governor Kim Reynolds declared a State Public Health Emergency. In her proclamation, she cited several sections of the Iowa Code that gives her this authority. I believe that We the People of Iowa have given her the executive authority to act, so we should do what she is asking us to do.

When the pandemic subsides, Governor Reynolds will relinquish her emergency powers. We will all look back and determine if she acted appropriately and learn from this. At that time, if we're dissatisfied with the amount of power she's been given, we should change the law. Just like everything from illegal immigration to the speed limit, if you don't like the law, fine, change the law the right way but don't just ignore it and pretend it doesn't exist.

Remember this: if anyone in the government (state or federal) doesn't give up the power they've wielded during a time of emergency, we have other remedies. I've said it before and I'll say it again here—at some point in the next 500 years, our government will overreach. That is why the 2nd Amendment was written and why it is the protector of all our rights and liberties.

Now is the time to protect your family and your fellow Americans. Use this time to actually have a conversation with the ones you love.

May God continue to watch over you and bless our great country.
TELL A FRIEND (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489)
LIKE US ON FACEBOOK (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489)
PUT UP A SIGN (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489)
CONTRIBUTE $10 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together in the coming months.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. We need you to tell more people about our campaign. As we shift to a more virtual campaign, we need you to help us spread our message on Facebook, Instagram, or however you communicate with others from home.
RECENT COVERAGE

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-discusses-change-in-campaign-strategy-during-coronavirus-talks-about-lessons-learned-so-far-from-campaign-trail/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489

"We also need to talk about real Republican ideas on reforming healthcare. It’s not just about insurance reform. There are conservative solutions out there. Unfortunately, those things, if we don’t talk about them, we’re eventually going to get socialized medicine because that’s all the Democrats talk about."
STAY INFORMED
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PyVqQEvzX0E&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489

On the issues:
* Protecting Life (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKFcqll_hko&t=94s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489)
* Lowering Healthcare Costs (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VKawyHECZVI&t=5s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489)
* Securing the Border (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2feYd5WAXtU&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489)
* Sticking up for Iowa Energy (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w1HB4hYMDUQ&t=1s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c0e66aa0e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c0e66aa0e2-25822489)

clean_body: Wash your hands, call your friends, check in on your neighbors. Today, the Iowa Department of Public Health (IDPH) has been notified of 64 new positive cases of Iowans with COVID-19, bringing the total to 298. To put that in perspective, there have been 4,375 negative tests to date. Even during this challenging time, it's just as important as ever to retake the House from Nancy Pelosi. See what she tried to pull last week? We need more everyday Iowans in DC who can tell the difference between what's needed and what's pork. Hello I once again want to thank everyone involved in the healthcare field for all you're doing. Your work is crucial to slowing the spread of this virus. But EVERY IOWAN needs to do their part. Keep your distance from others, wash your hands, and isolate as much as possible. Iowa is and always will be a agricultural state. We won't be able to put off planting for six to eight weeks. When it's time to plant, everyone will be essential. The world can only eat if Iowa works. PROTECTING OUR RIGHTS I get asked by many people if our rights are being taken away from us during this time of crisis. Let me first say that I think the nation's governors are acting in good faith. Most of them seem to be reluctantly doing things that temporarily limit our rights. They are asking for us to follow their guidance rather than using law enforcement to clamp down on us citizens. Last week, Governor Kim Reynolds declared a State Public Health Emergency. In her proclamation, she cited several sections of the Iowa Code that gives her this authority. I believe that We the People of Iowa have given her the executive authority to act, so we should do what she is asking us to do. When the pandemic subsides, Governor Reynolds will relinquish her emergency powers. We will all look back and determine if she acted appropriately and learn from this. At that time, if we're dissatisfied with the amount of power she's been given, we should change the law. Just like everything from illegal immigration to the speed limit, if you don't like the law, fine, change the law the right way but don't just ignore it and pretend it doesn't exist. Remember this: if anyone in the government (state or federal) doesn't give up the power they've wielded during a time of emergency, we have other remedies. I've said it before and I'll say it again here—at some point in the next 500 years, our government will overreach. That is why the 2nd Amendment was written and why it is the protector of all our rights and liberties. Now is the time to protect your family and your fellow Americans. Use this time to actually have a conversation with the ones you love. May God continue to watch over you and bless our great country. TELL A FRIEND () LIKE US ON FACEBOOK () PUT UP A SIGN () CONTRIBUTE $10 () As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you. Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together in the coming months. I appreciate your continued support. Your neighbor, p.s. We need you to tell more people about our campaign. As we shift to a more virtual campaign, we need you to help us spread our message on Facebook, Instagram, or however you communicate with others from home. RECENT COVERAGE "We also need to talk about real Republican ideas on reforming healthcare. It’s not just about insurance reform. There are conservative solutions out there. Unfortunately, those things, if we don’t talk about them, we’re eventually going to get socialized medicine because that’s all the Democrats talk about." STAY INFORMED On the issues: Protecting Life () Lowering Healthcare Costs () Securing the Border () Sticking up for Iowa Energy () and much more... () GET INVOLVED BARN SIGNS ARE AVAILABLE NOW! EMAIL INFO@RICHARDSFORCONGRESS.COM (mailto:info@richardsforcongress.com) TO GET YOURS TODAY! We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Send your neighbor to Congress instead! Even if you're unable to donate () we still need your help! Serve as a neighborhood team captain? Know a good place for a barn sign? The Iowa Department of Public Health (IDPH) has been notified of 38 additional positive cases of Iowans with COVID-19, for a total of 336 positive cases. There have been a total of 5,013 negative tests to date, which includes testing reported by the State Hygienic Lab and other labs. (as of 6:00 p.m. 3/29/2020) Visit https://idph.iowa.gov?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=27ef4cf99c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-27ef4cf99c-25822489 for the most current information.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4Ts3ih44mFs&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=27ef4cf99c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-27ef4cf99c-25822489

Even during this challenging time, it's just as important as ever to retake the House from Nancy Pelosi. See what she tried to pull last week? We need more everyday Iowans in DC who can tell the difference between what's needed and what's pork.
https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=27ef4cf99c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-27ef4cf99c-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=27ef4cf99c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-27ef4cf99c-25822489

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=27ef4cf99c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-27ef4cf99c-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=27ef4cf99c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-27ef4cf99c-25822489
Hello

I once again want to thank everyone involved in the healthcare field for all you're doing. Your work is crucial to slowing the spread of this virus.

But EVERY IOWAN needs to do their part. Keep your distance from others, wash your hands, and isolate as much as possible.

Iowa is and always will be a agricultural state. We won't be able to put off planting for six to eight weeks. When it's time to plant, everyone will be essential. The world can only eat if Iowa works.

PROTECTING OUR RIGHTS
I get asked by many people if our rights are being taken away from us during this time of crisis. Let me first say that I think the nation's governors are acting in good faith. Most of them seem to be reluctantly doing things that temporarily limit our rights. They are asking for us to follow their guidance rather than using law enforcement to clamp down on us citizens.

Last week, Governor Kim Reynolds declared a State Public Health Emergency. In her proclamation, she cited several sections of the Iowa Code that gives her this authority. I believe that We the People of Iowa have given her the executive authority to act, so we should do what she is asking us to do.

When the pandemic subsides, Governor Reynolds will relinquish her emergency powers. We will all look back and determine if she acted appropriately and learn from this. At that time, if we're dissatisfied with the amount of power she's been given, we should change the law. Just like everything from illegal immigration to the speed limit, if you don't like the law, fine, change the law the right way but don't just ignore it and pretend it doesn't exist.

Remember this: if anyone in the government (state or federal) doesn't give up the power they've wielded during a time of emergency, we have other remedies. I've said it before and I'll say it again here—at some point in the next 500 years, our government will overreach. That is why the 2nd Amendment was written and why it is the protector of all our rights and liberties.

Now is the time to protect your family and your fellow Americans. Use this time to actually have a conversation with the ones you love.

May God continue to watch over you and bless our great country.
TELL A FRIEND (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=27ef4cf99c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-27ef4cf99c-25822489)
LIKE US ON FACEBOOK (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=27ef4cf99c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-27ef4cf99c-25822489)
PUT UP A SIGN (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=27ef4cf99c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-27ef4cf99c-25822489)
CONTRIBUTE $10 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=27ef4cf99c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-27ef4cf99c-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together in the coming months.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. We need you to tell more people about our campaign. As we shift to a more virtual campaign, we need you to help us spread our message on Facebook, Instagram, or however you communicate with others from home.

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-discusses-change-in-campaign-strategy-during-coronavirus-talks-about-lessons-learned-so-far-from-campaign-trail/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=27ef4cf99c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-27ef4cf99c-25822489

Unfortunately, those things, if we don’t talk about them, we’re eventually going to get socialized medicine because that’s all the Democrats talk about."
